title: Quantum Annealing: Optimization with D-Wave
author: Flux Anderson
Quantum Computing Engineer
description: Solve optimization problems on quantum annealers—but problem mapping is an art
content:
Quantum annealers find ground states of optimization problems using quantum tunneling.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Annealing Accident (2041)](/docs/articles/annealing-accident-2041)
